INTEGRATED FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT INFORMATION SYSTEM (IFMIS)
OVERVIEW

We offer a single unified solution that is purpose-built for the public sector designed to help you increase accountability, transparency, and performance. Our IFMIS Offering includes;

• Public Financial Management Consulting

• Performance Based Budgeting Tool

• Financial & Treasury Management

• Revenue Management

• Funds, Project and Grants Management

• E-Procurement

• Fixed Assets Management

• Debt Management

• Project Investment Management System

• Projects Monitoring and Evaluation

BENEFITS

ACHIEVE FISCAL TRANSPARENCY WITH BUDGET VISIBILITY AND USE ROLE-BASED SECURITY FOR GREATER CONTROL

MANAGE YOUR CASH FLOW EFFECTIVELY

IMPROVE CITIZEN SERVICES BY TRACKING REVENUES, EXPENDITURES AND PERSONNEL AGAINST BUDGET OBJECTIVES

IMPROVE THE EFFICIENCY OF YOUR FINANCIAL OPERATIONS AND ENABLE STRATEGIC PLANNING ACTIVITIES

ADAPT TO CHANGING LEGISLATIVE REQUIREMENTS WITH REAL-TIME INSIGHT AND CONFIGURABLE WORKFLOWS
